schema.description: Describes the request body of the /indexuser API call

version.description: Version number for document for optimistic concurrency control. If absent or 0 then no version checks are done.

datasource.description: The datasource for which the user is added

user.description: The user to be added or updated

userId.description: To be supplied if the user id in the datasource is not the email

isActive.description: set to false if the user is a former employee or a bot

user.title: DatasourceUserDefinition

schema.title: IndexUserRequest
